work_unit: MC-001 symlink TOCTOU on new-file leaf in resolve_storage_path (paths.rs:65)
situation: audit-2026-07-07-028 derived_fixes 8 pending. _status_note 指示下一步派发 MC-001 (medium route-fix). paths.rs new-file fallback canonicalizes parent then re-appends file_name; attacker pre-placing symlink at leaf lets writes escape base_dir after parent check passes.
action: Add symlink_metadata (lstat) check on leaf after cp.join(file). If leaf exists and is symlink, reject with descriptive Err. Only regular files or truly-nonexistent leaves permitted. Add regression test symlink_leaf_in_new_file_fallback_rejected creating dangling symlink to /etc/passwd inside base_dir and asserting resolve_storage_path returns Err.
outcome_evidence: Commit a8b111f on auto/opt-moni-core-1783359735 pushed to origin. cargo test -p moni-core --lib paths:: ran 6/6 passed including new symlink_leaf_in_new_file_fallback_rejected. Worktree branch tracks origin/auto/opt-moni-core-1783359735.
next_suggestion: Next derived_fix to dispatch: COGALPHA-05 (unbounded LLM output parsing in llm.rs:183, low route-fix). After that M-005-risk (daily loss limit <= boundary semantics, low route-fix). Direction-shifts (M-001-position, COGALPHA-03, COGALPHA-04, MC-003, MC-004) queue after route-fixes clear.

audit_findings.finding: MC-001 TOCTOU: new-file fallback cp.join(file) did not verify leaf was non-symlink; attacker-preplaced symlink inside base_dir pointing outside would pass parent canonicalization check but subsequent writes follow symlink to arbitrary location
audit_findings.remediation: Added symlink_metadata (lstat) check after join; reject if leaf exists and is_symlink(). Added regression test.
